_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Floating Input
_meta.description: This component is a modern floating-label input designed for clean, user-friendly forms. It features an icon on the left, which can represent the type of input (like email, username, or password), and a label that smoothly floats above the field when focused or filled, eliminating the need for a traditional placeholder. The input automatically adjusts padding so that typed text never overlaps the icon or label.
